name: PT Adira Dinamika Multi Finance Tbk
summary: PT Adira Dinamika Multi Finance Tbk provides consumer financing, murabahah financing, and finance leasing services in Indonesia. The company offers financing for new and used cars and motorcycles, as well as durable goods and other products. The company was founded in 1990 and is based in South Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Adira Dinamika Multi Finance Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Bank Danamon Indonesia Tbk.
